feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build apps local preview issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are developing apps in build apps in our customer subaccount. It was working perfectly fine till last week but from this week i have a problem running apps locally.

The dolan timestamp goes to error 

After few seconds i get network error like below

The same app from the same build lobby works fine for my other colleagues. Am i missing some config?? What would have changed suddenly. 

@beapasch - Any ideas on this issue?

Thanks and Regards,

Navya

entry.title: No deployment found for project version error in SBPA when using Actions in form
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am getting below error while opening a value help in form.
"No deployment found for project version "
I could see the Action working , when tested in Actions.
Please help me with this.
Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Is there any standard options to make a bulletin board function in SAP Sales Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi. I'm working on a project to make a bulletin board something like Q&A, or some place where Sales managers can communicate with Field managers. Is it available with only standard functions of Sales Cloud? Or do I need to add a custom field modification on Buildapps?

 

I added an example image of reddit main page. I want to make something like this.

entry.title: How to get the HTML code of a website with SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content: Hallo zusammen, ich versuche einen Prozess zu erstellen, um die Preise einiger Produkte zu prüfen. Dazu muss ich einige Links auf einer aufgezeichneten Website öffnen und den HTML-Code daraus abrufen. Ich finde in SAP BPA keine Aktivität, um den Code abzurufen. Hat jemand eine Idee, wie ich dieses Problem lösen kann?

entry.title: Migration of Workflow to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

My team and I are currently engaged in migrating workflows from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). We have been following the guidelines outlined in the documentation available at SAP Help Portal. However, we encountered an issue during step 4, which requires the import of the MTAR file from the old workflow, as there was no content available in the Manage Package application. Upon attempting this, we received the following error:

Additionally, it is important to note that our workflow module does not contain any "*.extension" files or any "packageinfo".

We seek your guidance on resolving this issue and would appreciate confirmation on whether our current approach is appropriate.

Furthermore, we plan to utilize BPA exclusively for workflow development. Could you please advise if it is feasible to edit the workflows directly within BPA after importing them, or will we need to continue using BAS for older workflows?

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,
Paul

entry.title: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My team and I are currently developing an application that requires the integration of workflows. It has come to my attention that SAP is actively addressing this topic, with an update released on August 16th.

At present, we are encountering issues when attempting to import these workflows into SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). I came across a community post from a year ago in which an SAP expert mentioned that workflows developed within BAS could only be managed and updated within BAS. Our intention was to use BPA exclusively for development.

Given the recent update, we would appreciate clarification on whether it is now possible to use BPA as the sole development environment, or if we are still required to manage the older workflows in BAS.

For reference, here is the community post from a year ago:
Workflow Migration 

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

Gabriel

entry.title: When deploying an app in Build Apps with Cloud Foundry, do I use the Cloud Foundry runtime?
entry.content:
We developed a web application using Build Apps. When deploying the application, we chose the Cloud Foundry environment and one Space, but we don't see the application in the SAP BTP Cockpit -> Cloud Foundry -> click on the chosen space -> Applications section. However, we see the application in the HTML5 Applications section.

My questions are:

  1. If I don't see the application in the SAP BTP Cockpit -> Cloud Foundry -> click on the chosen space -> Applications section, does this mean the app doesn't use the Cloud Foundry Runtime?

  2. If my application doesn't use the Cloud Foundry Runtime, is there any cost or limit for using the Cloud Foundry environment enabled with the Standard plan?

#BuildApps #CloudFoundry

entry.title: How to Access SAP Build Process trigger Forms with out any authentication?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have developed a sample SAP Build process Form trigger application, normally if we want to access the Form trigger, we have to deploy the Form into work zone and access it with credentials. 





Is there any way we can access the developed Form without any credentials (as a public Form), so that anyone with app link can access the application.

Can anyone please help on this.

Thanks in Advance,
Ramya T.

entry.title: Is there way enable and disable tile and catalog through api in SAP workzone
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is requirement to enable or disable  tile and catalog on certain user action in capm application.

is there any way we can control the visibility of tile on work zone launchpage ?

for some user i want to display or assign catalog if he qualify the condition.

Regards

Ratnesh

Ratnesh

entry.title: SAP BUILD APPS Showing Blank page after login in SAP BTP and opening Build Apps Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am logging in SAP BTP Cockpit, and after that I want to open SAP Build Apps application,

after clicking on 'Go to Application', it is showing blank page

Please help in resolving this issue

entry.title: SAP Build apps action. Can't read JSON from API
entry.content:
When running a test on an action in SAP Build I get the following error.

{
"code": 12000,
"message": "Execution of action failed",
"correlationId": "27932dd7-91bf-4fe8-4402-19710945fc43",
"details": [
{ "code": 12000,
"message": "Failed to create action output for action get and response code 200: Cannot convert undefined or null to object",
"severity": "ERROR"
}
]

[
  {
    "description": "xxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 186,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Condenser Cleaner 600ml Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6755",
      "score": 0.8306616847524148
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.8306616847524148
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 185,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Condenser Cleaner 1L Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6725",
      "score": 0.823491177142724
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.823491177142724
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 184,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Condenser Cleaner Conc 1L Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6695",
      "score": 0.8102495639772882
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.8102495639772882
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 187,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Universal Coil Cleaner Conc 1L Box Lbl",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "6785",
      "score": 0.8033885945712105
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.8033885945712105
  },
  {
    "description": "xxxxxx",
    "metadata": {
      " below_unit": " -",
      " global_trade_item_number": 139,
      " in_unit": " -",
      " lead_time": 15,
      " max_energy_consumption": " -",
      " max_flow": 0,
      " max_rec_head": 0,
      " name": " Conden Clean & Degr 600ml Label ES REV2",
      " remotely": " -",
      " site_id": " BR1000",
      " sound_db": 0,
      " suction_lift": 0,
      " system_type": " -",
      " trunking": " -",
      "product_id": "7060",
      "score": 0.7943730599435553
    },
    "similarity_score": 0.7943730599435553
  }
]

The body of the reponse also converts the whole the payload into a string.

The above works fine when creating a data integration in SAP Build apps.

Also, simpler JSON seems to work fine in a SAP Build Action.

[
    {
        "xxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.8306556940078735
    },
    {
        "xxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.823538373497823
    },
    {
        "xxxxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.8102967256130754
    },
    {
        "product_description": "xxxx",
        "product_id": null,
        "product_name": null,
        "similarity_score": 0.8034826272459229
    }
]

Please advise as our API needs to be called from a SAP Build Action (to be used in a process automation), a SAP Build app or anywhere else.

entry.title: SAP BPA application shows Blank Page
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have successfully subscribed for SAP BPA and it got created as well & then completed the role assignment also. But while accessing the BPA application, it is showing blank page.

Could you please suggest how to fix this.

Many Thanks

entry.title: Unable to laod SAP Build Process Automation - In Maintenance Mode message
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When i try to open my SAP Build Process Automation, I'm getting the below attached message.

 

Any idea why i'm getting this? or how much more time it would take? Can i do something to fix this?

I was trying to complete the following tutorial when it started - Create a CAP Service with BAS Productivity Tools and I had completed the setup of SAP Build Apps with Booster when the Maintenance message appeared.

Thanks in advance

Adam

entry.title: Loop/Iterate in the SAP Build Process Autoamtion Process flow
entry.content:
I am looking for a way to use loops or iterate calling an action in the process.

I am aware of the looping fucntionality and other conditions available in the automation, but currently I am looking for loops in the Process alone, that way not having to use automation/desktop agent.


Please let me know if the functionality is already present or if there can be any workarounds that I can use.
Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP Build project isn't displayed
entry.content:
Hi,

In the last week, I can't see my project.

I created an automation project, but in the last week, when I click on my project in the SAP build lobby I am getting a blank page, where before I used to get the list of the components of my projects.

It is the same, no matter what project I am trying to open.

I tried my trial account and it is the same, and my colleague are also having the same experience.

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null.
entry.content: I am creating a simple automation of outlook using this https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-outlook-automation.html#6d46ac9d-1797-4178-808d-8438c019d13b . But i'm getting error "Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null. " when i'm testing the automation.

entry.title: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation. It returns a Blank screen and registration doesn't complete.

entry.title: Issue displaying data in item list in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I need a hand regarding an app I'm creating in Build Apps.

I'm building a pretty straight-forward app for our clients to approve their own invoices. It is composed of 4 screens (Authentication, Invoice list, Invoice Details and Account Balance). Basically, after authenticating, the Invoice List page appears, then the user selects an invoice and is taken to the Invoice Details page where she/he can either approve or reject the invoice. If she/he approves the invoice, the number and amount of the invoice appear on the Account Balance page. Each time an invoice is approved, the related data is added to the Balance page.

So I manage to display an approved invoice in the item list of the Balance page. However, when I approve another invoice, it is not added to the previously approved one on the Balance page: it replaces it.

Below you will find several screenshots showing how I configured both Invoice Details page and Balance page: could you please give a look to see what I am missing please? I also joined a short video.

Here is the app variable I defined, named “approvedInvoice” (list of 3 objects), where I want to store the data of the invoices that are being approved:

Here is the logic flow I added to the Approve button ("Set app variable", where I added the app variable I created in the properties and assign the value with a custom list):

When I click on the Custom list of the Assigned value from the above screen, here is what I configured (DATA ENTITY TEST being my data source, the one from which I get all the data of my invoices that are display in the Invoices page):

Here is how I configured the Open Page properties ("approvedInvoice" being my page parameter):

And here you can see how I configured my list item in the Balance page:

See the video here for better understanding (N.B.: as you will notice, I'm currently displaying the client name in place of the amount, it is just temporary and does not change the problem raised in this post):

This is what happens when I approve more than one invoice: approved invoices don't pile up, only the latest approved one is displayed...

Would you be so kind and give me just a hint to solve this please? I'm stuck on this for a week now and it is blocking the whole project...

Many thanks beforehand for your help and I'm looking forward to reading you.

BR,

LM.

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)
